title: 100 years Cell and Tissue Research: the founders and their successors.
abstract: One hundred years ago, Cell and Tissue Research was founded under the title "Zeitschrift für Zellen- und Gewebelehre," later "Zeitschrift für Zellforschung und mikroskopische Anatomie." The founders were four eminent German and Swiss cell biologists and zoologists, R. Goldschmidt, W. von Möllendorff, H. Bauer, and J. Seiler.
